text: when an aim has a phase as committed to that does not exist anymore, remove that entry from committed to. aim becomes free floating. Check children aims whenever a phase is deleted. And also once when loadin the project server side to clean up corrupt state.

status.comment: Implemented in packages/backend/src/server.ts (cleanupCommitments helper, phase.delete hook, project.repair mutation) and packages/frontend/src/stores/data.ts (loadProject hook).
